definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="ArrayList" id="killer">killer</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1024</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1024</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="arraylist_add_value"><field name="output_type">Any</field><value name="value"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">new byte[1024 * 1024]</field></block></value><value name="var"><block type="variables_get_arraylist"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:killer</field></block></value></block></statement></block></statement><next><block type="call_procedure"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="procedure">MemoryDeath</field></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
